mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bnc_contract WHERE cntr_proj_number = #{proj_number}

SELECT cntr_proj_number, cntr_price, cntr_flag, cntr_start_date, cntr_end_date,
cntr_req_biznum, cntr_req_ceo_name, cntr_req_sign_path,
cntr_acp_biznum, cntr_acp_ceo_name, cntr_acp_sign_path, cntr_rdate, cntr_udate,
cntr_contents
FROM bnc_contract
WHERE cntr_proj_number = #{proj_number}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bnc_contract ( cntr_proj_number, cntr_price, cntr_flag, cntr_rdate, cntr_udate, cntr_acp_biznum, cntr_req_biznum, cntr_req_sign_path, cntr_req_ceo_name, cntr_start_date, cntr_end_date, cntr_contents ) VALUES( #{cntr_proj_number}, #{cntr_price}, 'N', TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), #{cntr_acp_biznum}, #{cntr_req_biznum}, #{cntr_req_sign_path}, #{cntr_req_ceo_name}, #{cntr_start_date}, #{cntr_end_date}, #{cntr_contents} )

UPDATE bnc_contract SET
cntr_price = #{cntr_price}, cntr_flag = 'N', cntr_udate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss'), cntr_req_sign_path = #{cntr_req_sign_path}, cntr_req_ceo_name = #{cntr_req_ceo_name}, cntr_start_date = #{cntr_start_date}, cntr_end_date = #{cntr_end_date}, cntr_contents = #{cntr_contents},
cntr_acp_sign_path = null, cntr_acp_ceo_name = null
WHERE cntr_proj_number = #{cntr_proj_number}
mapper.select: select cntc_cmpy_biznum, cntc_contract_form from bnc_contract_company WHERE cntc_cmpy_biznum = #{cmpy_biznum}
